message:
feat(search): add quality_timeout_ms config and continue runtime_compat migration

main.rs:
- Add effective_search_quality_timeout_ms() to read and clamp the
  search.quality_timeout_ms config field (min 1ms)
- Wire quality timeout into semantic_budget_config at both robot-mode
  and interactive search execution sites, giving users control over
  how long the hybrid search waits for semantic results
- Add fast_only short-circuit in effective_search_fusion_weights()
  to skip semantic scoring entirely when search.fast_only is set
- Add test: effective_search_quality_timeout_ms_clamps_to_positive

mux_pool.rs:
- Convert all #[tokio::test] async tests to run_async_test() pattern
  using RuntimeBuilder::current_thread() + CompatRuntime::block_on()
- Switch unix stream read import from tokio to runtime_compat adapter
- No behavioral changes to pool logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
